title: Egyptian Lentil Stew
description: A hearty and comforting vegan stew inspired by Egyptian cuisine, made with red lentils and a blend of aromatic spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion, garlic, carrot, and celery, and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add cumin, coriander, and paprika, and cook for 1 minute.
Add lentils, diced tomatoes, and vegetable broth. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 30-40 minutes, or until the lentils are tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
